hero.title: Our Impact
hero.subtitle: Every number represents a young person whose life was changed.

statsNote: TODO: Replace all placeholder numbers with confirmed figures from the client.

items.quote: DreamDo transformed my daughter's confidence. She now talks about starting her own business someday — and I believe she will.
items.name: Amina K.

items.quote: My son was shy and reluctant to engage in school. After two terms at DreamDo, he leads group projects. The change is remarkable.
items.name: David O.

items.quote: I never thought I could code. Now I'm building a simple app to help my mom track her small business sales. DreamDo showed me I could.
items.name: Kwame A.

items.quote: The Little Farmers program made me realise that farming isn't just for old people. It can be modern and exciting!
items.name: Zara M.

items.quote: As an employer, I've seen firsthand how DreamDo graduates arrive workplace-ready. Their problem-solving mindset and initiative set them apart.
items.name: Grace M.

items.quote: We hosted three Pathways students last quarter. Two are now on our internship shortlist. DreamDo delivered exactly what they promised.
items.name: James T.
